title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 337.060 - Licensed psychologists not to practice medicine
text:
337.060.  Licensed psychologists not to practice medicine. — Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as authorizing persons licensed and registered as psychologists to engage in any manner in the practice of medicine as defined in the laws of this state.
(L. 1977 H.B. 255 § 11, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16)
